title: Phone call: solving a problem
subtitle: Handle a practical phone call.
overview: Phone calls require clear purpose and confirmation.
Use llamo porque and para confirmar.

items.es: Llamo porque tengo un problema con mi reserva.
items.en: I am calling because I have a problem with my reservation.

items.es: Quisiera confirmar la hora de la cita.
items.en: I would like to confirm the appointment time.
Could you repeat the reservation number?

items.es: Entonces, la cita queda confirmada para el viernes.
items.en: So, the appointment is confirmed for Friday.
Thank you very much for your help.

lines.speaker: A
lines.es: Buenos días, llamo para confirmar una cita.
lines.en: Good morning, I am calling to confirm an appointment.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Of course. Can you tell me your name?

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Su cita está confirmada para mañana a las diez.
lines.en: Your appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at ten.
